subject: Galarian Mr. Rime, a large humanoid Pokemon in a dark coat with a top-hat-like head and a cane of ice, performing a theatrical dancing pose
description: A large, rotund humanoid figure in a dark coat dances with theatrical flair, holding what appears to be a cane of ice. The head is distinctive — pale and rounded with a dark top-hat-like upper portion. The pose is wide and expressive, arms spread, suggesting a stage performer mid-routine. The background is an icy, cold-toned environment. The palette is dark navy and purple for the coat against a frosty white and pale-blue background.
foreground: large humanoid figure in dark coat dancing with an ice cane
